name: Raspberry Cheesecake Cookie Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter in a large mixing bowl with an electric mixer on medium to high speed for 30 seconds.
2. Add the sugar and beat until combined.
3. Beat in the egg yolk and vanilla extract until well incorporated.
4. Gradually add the flour, beating as much as possible with the mixer, then stir any remaining flour with a wooden spoon.
5. Spread the dough evenly in a lightly greased 12- or 13-inch pizza pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Meanwhile, beat together the cream cheese, egg, and tablespoon sugar until smooth.
8. Spread the mixture over the hot crust, leaving at least half an inch from the edge.
9. Dollop the reserved raspberry preserves on top.
10. Use a knife to swirl the preserves throughout the filling.
11. Sprinkle the toasted almonds on top.
12. Bake for an additional 5 to 10 minutes, or until the filling is set.
13. Allow to cool in the pan on a wire rack before cutting into wedges.
14. Store in the refrigerator.
Makes 12 to 16 servings.
